message:
🌱 Add traefik: Please disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by default mission (#1631)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-6756-please-disable-tls-1-0-and-1-1-by-default",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: Please disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by default",
+    "description": "Please disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by default. This issue affects 66+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify traefik upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your traefik deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik -n traefik --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review traefik configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik
kubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik
```
Using TLS 1.0 or 1.1 is considered insecure these days. It should be used only by those who really know what they're doing. For that reason, I suggest disabling TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by default.

I'm on Traefik 2.2.1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Please disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by default",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?

Change the default TLS Options for more security while maintaining compatibility with most clients

### Motivation

https://github.com/golang/go/issues/45428

Go will remove support for TLS 1.0 and 1.1 soon, so I think it's better if we prepare in advance by changing the
```yaml
tls:
  options:
    default:
      minVersion: VersionTLS12
      cipherSuites:
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Please disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1 by default is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik -n traefik --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What does this PR do?

Change the default TLS Options for more security while maintaining compatibility with most clients

### Motivation

https://github.com/golang/go/issues/45428

Go will remove support for TLS 1.0 and 1.1 soon, so I think it's better if we prepare in advance by changing the default values and then adding a notice on the deprecations page.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "tls:
  options:
    default:
      minVersion: VersionTLS12
      cipherSuites:
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305",
+        "image: "traefik:v2.2.8"
 tls:
   options:
     default:
       minVersion: VersionTLS12
       cipherSuites:
         - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
         - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
         - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
         - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
         - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
         - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
 restart: always",
+        "$ cat traefik/traefik.dynamic.yaml
tls:
  options:
    default:
      minVersion: VersionTLS12
      cipherSuites:
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "traefik",
+      "community",
+      "ingress",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "traefik"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/6756",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/traefik/traefik/pull/8951"
+    },
+    "reactions": 66,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:43:55.237Z",
